title: Auckland Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Auckland, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, to plan an affordable and fun family holiday in July 2026.
intro: Auckland is a fantastic destination for families, with a wide range of activities and attractions to suit all ages and budgets. With the right deals and discounts, you can have a fun and memorable holiday without breaking the bank. In this article, we'll share the best family deals in Auckland, including current booking discounts and money-saving tips.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off Auckland activities, including Kelly Tarlton's SEA LIFE Aquarium, Auckland Zoo, and Sky Tower. This is a great way to save money on some of Auckland's most popular attractions. Additionally, Discover Cars has family campervans available from $89/day, which can be a cost-effective way to explore the city and surrounding areas.

Cover-More travel insurance is also available from $4.50/day, providing comprehensive cover for your family holiday. Booking.com has a range of holiday parks and motels in Auckland, with free cancellation on most bookings.
list: Up to 40% off Auckland activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Comprehensive travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Auckland has a wide range of activities and attractions that are great value for families. Some of the best-value activities include visiting the Auckland Zoo, which costs around $25 per adult and $13 per child, and taking a ferry trip to Waiheke Island, which costs around $40 per adult and $20 per child return.

The Sky Tower observation deck is also a great value activity, with prices starting from around $32 per adult and $16 per child. Kelly Tarlton's SEA LIFE Aquarium is another popular attraction, with prices starting from around $39 per adult and $24 per child.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips
sections.body: Here are some money-saving tips to help you plan an affordable family holiday in Auckland:
list: Book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices
Consider visiting during the off-season (April to May or September to November) when prices are lower
Look for package deals that include accommodation, activities, and transport
Use public transport or walk/bike whenever possible to save on transport costs
Pack your own food and snacks instead of buying them at attractions or restaurants
Take advantage of free activities such as visiting the beach or going for a walk in one of Auckland's many parks
